case_title: WILLIAM M. ABEND VS WOO, PAUL H. : PRESIDENT/ PFW ASSOCIATES

docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WILLIAM M.
